rag_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are visible in the current scope and properly typed.
Place component type contracts in the component type annex and implementation bindings in the implementation annex.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths.
Ensure all AGREE declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantee expressions must be well-typed and reference only visible features or declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
Do not use invalid or unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
